title: Joshua's Recrafted Textures
description: A New Version of Joshua Textures built from the ground up!
body:
# Description
**Joshua's Recrafted Textures** is a New version of **Joshuas Textures**, but comepletely remade from the ground up! This new pack focuses on both reworking what went wrong in the old pack, and making the game look better then ever!... Hence the _"Recrafted"_ part.

### What this pack has Right Now:
**A lot of new textures for Ground-blocks, Stone-blocks, Nether-blocks, and Materials. We also have new and altered textures for a some of the Items!**

### What I want to Add:
More Variated Textures for blocks, New textures for most Mobs, Animated textures, and Hopefully Connected Textures!
